PARENTS CLUB

Parents and Supporters, Welcome!

You are an essential collaborator in ensuring your student’s academic and personal success. Choosing a university is one of the most important decisions that any parent gets involved in. You play a significant role as a parent or supporter of a university student during their first year and beyond.

This page offers answers to some of our most frequently asked questions and various tools to help your student on their academic path.

Why Kadir Has University? It's all about aiming to be the greatest!

Kadir Has University provides students with a high-quality education reinforced by research and experiential learning opportunities. In an era of information overload in which a growing number of people and devices compete to think for us, we aim to help your child build a solid foundation of knowledge, skills, and values necessary for navigating the complexities of our time and contributing to a peaceful and sustainable world.

Parents Enquiry Form

Please fill out this form to get detailed information. You will be informed relevant activities.
